HeroSection.name: Maximilian Lamm
HeroSection.title: Creative Full-Stack Developer
HeroSection.subtitle: I build beautiful, responsive, and performant web applications. Passionate about modern web technologies and great user experiences.

AboutSection.title: About Me
AboutSection.bio: I'm a passionate developer with a knack for creating elegant solutions in the least amount of time. I have a strong background in both front-end and back-end development, with extensive experience in building scalable and maintainable applications. My journey in web development started with a deep curiosity for how things work, and it has evolved into a career where I can blend technical skills with creative problem-solving.

ProjectShowcase.title: My Projects
ProjectShowcase.subtitle: Here are some of my recent projects from GitHub. Explore them to see my skills in action.
